== Notes for [[Item:Q53354|Q53354]] ==

The wife of George who was beaten by him when he was drunk. She was the person who first discovered agriculture but he was the first person to discover alcohol.
<p>She was an alcoholic too, and did care deeply for him. She outlived George
<p>However she did not run Gobeklitepe as her son Malcolm Mureybet immediately took over.
<p>George Gobekli was monogamous so all his descendants descend from her too.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
